tip.sparkstrength.corrupt_cop.active: Arrogant ASF: ON (%s to turn off)
tip.sparkstrength.corrupt_cop.inactive: Arrogant ASF: OFF (%s to turn on)
item.sparkstrength.capture_device.toolti: Right-click to place on floors or ceilings; hidden from players while held
Players in range are immobilized and a capture report is generated for the placer
Disappears automatically if it is not triggered in time
item.sparkstrength.power_restoration.too: If a blackout is active, buying this immediately ends it
item.sparkstrength.capture_report.toolti: Your capture device caught %s player(s). Their names are:
item.sparkstrength.invisibility_serum.to: Right-click a player within 1.5 blocks to feed it to them; otherwise drink it yourself
Grants 15s invisibility and hides them from living non-Professor instinct vision
item.sparkstrength.doorpassing_potion.to: Right-click a player within 1.5 blocks to feed it to them; otherwise drink it yourself
Lets the drinker pass through any Wathe door for 20s
item.sparkstrength.sedative.tooltip.line: Right-click a player within 1.5 blocks to feed it to them; otherwise drink it yourself
item.sparkstrength.truth_serum.tooltip.l: Right-click a player within 1.5 blocks to feed it to them; otherwise drink it yourself
Forces the drinker to reveal their role to everyone
item.sparkstrength.morph_reagent.tooltip: First right-click samples a player or body within 1.5 blocks; otherwise samples yourself
Second right-click marks a player within 1.5 blocks; otherwise marks yourself
If the mark target matches the sampled player, the mark fails and the reagent is not consumed
After marking, use the morph remote to trigger that player's disguise effect
item.sparkstrength.morph_device.tooltip: When there are marked players on the field, right-click this remote to trigger the morph effect.
shop.sparkstrength.capsule.description: Stores one food or drink, then forces the hit target to consume it.
shop.sparkstrength.tablet.description: Connects tablet holders for chat, meetings, and suspect tracking.
shop.sparkstrength.veteran_knife.descrip: Has 2 stabs. Uses the normal wind-up and sounds, with a 45-second cooldown after each stab.
shop.sparkstrength.engineer.capture_devi: Captures players in range and generates a report.
shop.sparkstrength.engineer.power_restor: If a blackout is active, buying this immediately ends it.
shop.sparkstrength.professor.doorpassing: Pass through any Wathe door for 20 seconds.
shop.sparkstrength.professor.invisibilit: 15 seconds of invisibility, only visible to Professors by instinct.
shop.sparkstrength.professor.truth_serum: Makes the target reveal their role to all online players.
shop.sparkstrength.professor.refresh_coo: Immediately refreshes the backpack player-selection cooldown.
shop.sparkstrength.morphling.morph_reage: Samples a player or body, marks a target, then uses the remote to trigger a 50s disguise.
screen.sparkstrength.criminologist.title: Criminologist
screen.sparkstrength.criminologist.subti: Choose who you think the killer is
message.sparkstrength.criminologist.cool: Criminologist is cooling down for %s seconds.
message.sparkstrength.criminologist.alre: You are already tracking a target and cannot switch before they die.
message.sparkstrength.criminologist.pend: You already locked onto a body and cannot switch before the target dies.
message.sparkstrength.demon_hunter_sniff: You sniffed out %s frenzied player(s) nearby
There are no frenzied players nearby for now...
The Demon Hunter sniffed out your presence
The Demon Hunter sniffed out your location!
message.sparkstrength.capsule.empty: The capsule has no food or drink inside.
message.sparkstrength.capture_device.cap: You were immobilized by a capture device!
There is no blackout right now, so the power restoration system cannot be purchased.
message.sparkstrength.professor.truth.ot: %s loudly revealed their role under the truth serum: %s
message.sparkstrength.professor.truth.se: You loudly told everyone your role under the truth serum
message.sparkstrength.morphling.same_tar: This player matches the sampled player, so they cannot be marked
message.sparkstrength.morphling.no_marks: There are no marked players right now
message.sparkstrength.tablet.meeting_den: Only living tablet holders in the game can use meetings.
message.sparkstrength.tablet.meeting_cha: You have no emergency meeting calls left this round.
message.sparkstrength.tablet.suspect_add: %s is now marked as a suspect.
replay.global.sparkstrength.professor_tr: %s loudly told everyone their role under the truth serum
replay.global.sparkstrength.capture_devi: %s was caught by a capture device and became immobilized
replay.global.sparkstrength.demon_hunter: %s did not sniff out any frenzied players nearby
replay.global.sparkstrength.morph_reagen: %s marked %s's DNA onto %s with a morph reagent
replay.global.sparkstrength.morph_mark_t: %s transformed into %s under the morph reagent
